name: io.github.sbrunner-atx/contest-mcp
description: Log amateur-radio QSOs to N3FJP logging software over its TCP API.

environmentVariables.name: N3FJP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: N3FJP API port (Settings → Application Program Interface). Default 1100. Not the multi-PC networking port.

environmentVariables.name: N3FJP_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Seconds to wait for an N3FJP response.

environmentVariables.name: N3FJP_ALLOW_DB_WIPE
environmentVariables.description: DANGER. When off (default), raw SQL that could delete/overwrite the entire log (DROP/TRUNCATE, unscoped DELETE/UPDATE) is refused. Only enable with a backup and full understanding of the risk.
